直通大结局！！虽然前期伏笔不少，人物刻画略显单薄，但是主角团就是在一次次经历中成长起来的！后期填坑精准到位，人物形象立体饱满！超绝搞笑日常怪谈篇！！爱了爱了！
真的很喜欢！不是披皮言情小说，很难不爱[学会了][学会了]超绝群像，你值得拥有！
补：补药啊补药完结啊，真的舍不得[快哭了][快哭了]","text_exts":[{"e":99,"s":95,"text":"言情小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A8%80%E6%83%85%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268249CC82F8FC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227482398492621079358%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227241220122239568908%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A8%80%E6%83%85%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742134911,"group_id":"7241220122239568908","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyAJUf7g9GVjaQV2m6NR4/w=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"653560895506382","user_name":"怪谈化美谈"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"653560895506382","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7241220122239568908","book_info":{"abstract":"【2023，送给你们的夏天】

夏天：生无可恋，暑假再见
-
连败的龙国，已陷落5座城市！
次次！都败在本土怪谈文化里！
再败一次，损失是小，大国颜面与地位不保！
世界耻笑！
夏天也只好认了这遭。
去怪谈世界里，趟暑假。
-
主线副本
第1副本：【爸爸的毕业相册】
第2副本：【四大名著外太空版】
第3副本：【组团拜狗】
第4副本：【母狮的忧郁症】
第5副本：【召唤我的老婆】
第6副本：【反转基因蚊全球总部】
第7副本：【有梦想的兵马俑】
第8副本：【怪谈入侵】
……
【天赋抽取中……】
【恭喜抽中史前新低，F级天赋《未成年人保护法》】
现役未成年·17岁·夏天：……
他好像抽了点东西。
又好像没抽。
这还怎么玩？
暑假！危矣！

e_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读35小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":124806,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1275},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7341472146199380760","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"夏天（主角）在诡谲的怪谈世界如鱼得水，绽放良善光辉的故事，如上。
这本规则怪谈，它的规则反不是主要，怪谈才是它的主旨。它走的不是严明规则路线，更多的是诙谐的巧妙反转，和脉脉温情的人文路线。虽然他不是一篇逻辑文，是一篇感情文，但也算值得一读。
个人评分其实更接近4.5星，可惜不能打半星。因为写作思路问题（啊，当然也可能是因为大纲或者不方便写），作品在现实和怪谈层面多少都带点理想主义色彩，有比较明显的脸谱化痕迹，略感失望。不过本身也不是走这个写作方向的，无伤大雅（摊手）","text_exts":[{"e":39,"s":35,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268249CC82F8FC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227341472146199380760%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227241220122239568908%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709459190,"group_id":"7241220122239568908","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阅读之路永不停息，脚步还未停息","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwcveSS5qqpAjIsOcQwhqhkw26PUOv3o1RyHY+Bue+LN","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789360&x-signature=kF0qy%2FZCs5KDejK6auO%2FMmXI91c%3D","user_id":"3958707667080302","user_name":"完本吞噬者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3958707667080302","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7241220122239568908","book_info":{"abstract":"【2023，送给你们的夏天】
